case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. REGINALD WAYNE BRYANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REGINALD WAYNE BRYANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, REGINALD WAYNE $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $342.60 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, REGINALD WAYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED DEC-26-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, REGINALD WAYNE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
